hero.title: A Morning by the Ocean, A Dinner with Elegance
hero.description: Welcome to La Medusa, a refined restaurant in Los Cristianos where the Atlantic Ocean becomes the perfect backdrop to your dining experience.

ourMenu.title: Discover Our Menu
ourMenu.p1: At our restaurant in Los Cristianos, each dish is a sophisticated combination of fresh ingredients, ocean freshness and distinctive Mediterranean flavours. As a leading Restaurant in Tenerife, we focus on quality, seasonality and authenticity.
ourMenu.p2: Our chefs create every plate from the freshest local produce. Rooted in Mediterranean tradition with an original accent, La Medusa stands proudly among the best restaurants in the region.

story.title: Every dish tells a story
story.description: At La Medusa, every ingredient and every flavour is a grateful embodiment of Mediterranean tradition. As a respected seafood restaurant in Tenerife, we ensure that each dish is not simply food, but an experience that lingers long after the last bite.

aboutUs.title: The Spirit of La Medusa
aboutUs.p1: As a celebrated Restaurant in Tenerife, we combine panoramic views, heartfelt service and a welcoming atmosphere that invites you to linger.
aboutUs.p2: From the way the light falls on the tables to the music played in the evening, everything in our restaurant in Los Cristianos is designed with care. Among the restaurants open late by the ocean, La Medusa offers a truly intimate setting perfect for couples, families and special occasions.

gallery.title: Gallery of the restaurant
gallery.description: Take a glimpse into the heart of our restaurant in Los Cristianos. Browse our gallery and discover why La Medusa is considered one of the best restaurants in Tenerife.

foodStory.title: Fresh Ingredients, Authentic Taste
foodStory.p1: Sea, sun and soul — all this on every plate at our Restaurant in Tenerife. We prioritise fresh local ingredients, combined with delicate execution.
foodStory.p2: This commitment places La Medusa among the most recommended restaurants open throughout the year in Los Cristianos.
foodStory.p3: Each dish reflects harmony: tender textures, vibrant colours and rich aromas. As a premium restaurant in Los Cristianos, we celebrate simplicity and sophistication in equal measure.

meets.decorative: Taste and atmosphere with an ocean view
meets.title: Where the sea meets taste
meets.p1: La Medusa is more than just a restaurant in Los Cristianos. It is a destination. With panoramic ocean views and exquisite Mediterranean cuisine, we create an atmosphere where taste and aesthetics become one seamless experience.
meets.p2: Whether you are searching for romantic restaurants, refined restaurants open late, or an exceptional seafood restaurant in Tenerife, La Medusa welcomes you to discover why we are recognised among the best restaurants on the island.

special.title: Special Deals
special.deal1Desc: From 2:30 PM to 6 PM, get two burgers for the price of one.
special.deal2Desc: Every Tuesday and Wednesday from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM, a glass of wine as a gift with any pasta.
special.deal3Desc: Daily from 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM, when ordering a seafood set, a glass of white wine is free.

queries.title: Frequently Asked Questions
queries.q1: Is La Medusa a seafood restaurant?
queries.a1: Yes, La Medusa is a Mediterranean seafood restaurant in Los Cristianos, offering fresh fish and locally sourced ingredients prepared with elegance.
queries.a2: We are a seaside restaurant in Los Cristianos, one of the most vibrant dining areas in Tenerife.
queries.a3: Yes, we are among the restaurants open late in the area, perfect for romantic dinners with ocean views.
queries.q4: Is La Medusa suitable for romantic dinners?
queries.a4: Absolutely. Our oceanfront setting makes us one of the most recommended romantic restaurants in Tenerife.
queries.a5: While we welcome walk-ins, we recommend booking in advance, especially during peak season, as one of the best restaurants in Los Cristianos tends to fill quickly.

reserve.title: Make your dinner special
reserve.p1: Book a table and spend an evening in an atmosphere of sophistication and inspiration.
reserve.p2: Your evening at La Medusa will be a story you will want to return to.

hero.title: WHO WE ARE
hero.description: The most important thing for us is to give you the comfortable dining experience

cuisine.title: Our Cuisine
cuisine.p1: La Medusa dishes are a combination of Mediterranean tradition with a modern vision. We prepare so that each dish is a story: textures, flavors, aromas - everything is felt.
cuisine.p2: Our chef experiments with accompaniments to the sea, using local products and recipes that have been enriched over the years.

ourTeam.title: Our team
ourTeam.description: We are a group of people in love with gastronomy and the sea. From the chef to the waiter, everyone contributes a piece of themselves to the experience you get at La Medusa.

chooseUs.title: Why Choose us
chooseUs.description: At La Medusa, every ingredient, every flavor is a grateful embodiment of Mediterranean tradition. Our chefs strive for each dish to be not just food, but an emotion that stays with you.
chooseUs.feature1Desc: We use only fresh local and imported products, and we pay close attention to every flavor and combination.
chooseUs.feature2Desc: A restaurant with a panoramic view of the sea, where every moment is filled with light and space.
chooseUs.feature3Desc: Our team takes care of you with sincerity, paying attention to the little things: from serving to dish recommendations.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.p1: La Medusa was born from the idea of creating a place where gastronomy and the sea come together in one atmosphere...
ourStory.p2: From the very beginning, we chose the path of sophistication: fresh ingredients, thoughtful recipes, and service that begins before you even arrive...
ourStory.p3: La Medusa is a team of people in love with cooking and hospitality. We strive to make each of our guests feel like they are not just a visitor, but a part of the story we are writing together.

guitar.title: Spanish Guitar Nights
guitar.p1: Every Monday and Saturday, La Medusa plays the best hits performed by masters of the Spanish guitar...
guitar.p2: This is the perfect time to enjoy signature cocktails, beautiful views, and spend the evening in exquisite company.

vocal.title: Live Vocal Hits & Cocktails
vocal.p1: Every Thursday and Friday, live vocal performances with famous world hits await you...
vocal.p2: Spend the end of the week with taste and rhythm — at La Medusa.

burgers.title: Happiness All Day Long
burgers.p1: At La Medusa, happiness isn't limited to a couple of hours — it's a feeling that lasts all day.
burgers.p2: From the first sip of wine to the last bite of seafood, every moment here is meant to be enjoyed slowly, with a view, with good company, and with a touch of Mediterranean magic.
burgers.p3: We're currently crafting something special for you — new offers and experiences are on their way.

hero.title: discover new facets of flavor
hero.description: Experience the taste of Mediterranean cuisine against the backdrop of the Atlantic Ocean. At La Medusa, we create an atmosphere where every moment is a pleasure and every dish is a story.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.description: The freshest ingredients for you every day

us.title: How to find us
us.description: We are waiting for you every day at the appointed time, with service ready to provide atmosphere and taste.

hero.title: Your Birthday, Our Celebration
hero.description: At La Medusa, a birthday becomes an event you will remember for a long time. Exquisite cuisine, a cozy atmosphere and a panoramic view create the perfect place for special moments.

why.title: Why Choose La Medusa for Your Birthday
why.feature1Desc: Elegant interior and a magical sea view.
why.feature2Desc: We will help you create the perfect selection of dishes and drinks.
why.feature3Desc: Create a special mood for guests.

gallery.title: A Place to Remember
gallery.description: Our restaurant creates the perfect combination of exquisite cuisine and panoramic views. This is a place where a birthday becomes more than a celebration - it is an unforgettable experience.

gift.title: Birthday Gifts from La Medusa
gift.p1: On your special day, we will make sure that the atmosphere is even warmer. For each birthday person, our chef prepares a birthday cake, which we serve with congratulations from the entire staff.
gift.p2: This is the moment when the restaurant is filled with sincere emotions, and your evening becomes even more festive. We believe that such details create memories that last forever.

grid.set1Desc: Seafood specialties: oysters, shrimp, grilled salmon and a set of white wines...
grid.set2Desc: A variety of pasta (Carbonara, Vongole, Truffle Tagliatelle) paired with Italian wine...
grid.set3Desc: An assortment of desserts from the chef: birthday cake, delicate tiramisu, panna cotta...

hero.title: Happy Hours at La Medusa
hero.description: The best time of day is when you can enjoy your favorite dishes and drinks at special prices. We created Happy Hours to make your meetings with friends or colleagues even more enjoyable.

why.title: Why You'll Love Our Happy Hours
why.p1: At this time, La Medusa turns into a place with a special atmosphere. We welcome not only profitable offers, but also a chance to try signature cocktails, signature dishes and enjoy live music.
why.p2: Happy Hours are not only about saving money, but also about new emotions.

gallery.title: Good Vibes, Great Company
gallery.description: Happy Hours at La Medusa are more than just a promotion. They are a time when people come together to relax, enjoy the music, socialize, and atmosphere of our restaurant.

reserve.title: join Us for Happy Hours
reserve.description: Don't miss the opportunity to experience the atmosphere of La Medusa at a special time. Reserve a table and spend the best hours of your day with us.

table.title: Book a table
table.description: Book a table with us today, we have a great atmosphere that you will love.

confirm.title: Booking confirmation
confirm.description: Please confirm whether you have entered everything correctly and write your email and phone number to confirm the booking.

hero.title: A Symphony of Pasta
hero.description: Homemade pasta made with the finest ingredients is the heart of Italian cuisine. At La Medusa, we create dishes that combine tradition and originality...

why.title: Why Our Pasta?
why.descDesktop: Pasta is not just a dish, but a moment of enjoyment.
why.descMobile: At La Medusa, every ingredient, every flavor is a grateful embodiment of Mediterranean tradition...
why.feature1Desc: We prepare the pasta ourselves, using authentic techniques.
why.feature2Desc: Combining the best of both worlds.
why.feature3Desc: From classic Bolognese to unique combinations with seafood.

gallery.title: For Every Taste
gallery.description: Delicate tagliatelle, aromatic penne, exquisite ravioli or classic spaghetti - our menu has a pasta for every mood...

hours.title: Every Plate Comes with Joy
hours.p1: At La Medusa, happiness isn't limited to a couple of hours — it's a feeling that lasts all day.
hours.p2: From the first sip of wine to the last bite of seafood, every moment here is meant to be enjoyed slowly, with a view, with good company, and with a touch of Mediterranean magic.
hours.p3: We're currently crafting something special for you — new offers and experiences are on their way.

meets.title: Tradition Meets Creativity
meets.p1: Pasta is a dish that has passed through the centuries and remains a symbol of comfort and gastronomic culture...
meets.p2: At La Medusa, we believe that pasta is the language of emotions...
meets.p3: For us, pasta is not just food, but a moment when time stops and you enjoy the harmony of taste, aroma, and atmosphere.

video.title: From Our Kitchen With Love
video.description: We believe that our guests feel our love for the process. From kneading the dough to the final touch on the plate, La Medusa pasta is created with soul.

reserve.title: Make your dinner special
reserve.p1: Book a table and spend an evening in an atmosphere of sophistication and inspiration.
reserve.p2: Your evening at La Medusa will be a story you will want to return to.

hero.title: Discover the Taste of the Ocean
hero.description: Fresh seafood delivered daily, in our chefs' original recipes. This is a culinary journey along the Mediterranean coast - from classic dishes to modern interpretations.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy of Seafood
philosophy.p1: We believe that the secret to a perfect meal is fresh fish and seafood, carefully selected spices and a balance of flavors...
philosophy.p2: Seafood at La Medusa is part of history and culture. We want every meal to be more than just lunch or dinner, but a moment to remember.

happyHours.title: Every Moment Is Happy Hour
happyHours.p1: At La Medusa, happiness isn't limited to a couple of hours — it's a feeling that lasts all day.
happyHours.p2: From the first sip of wine to the last bite of seafood, every moment here is meant to be enjoyed slowly, with a view, with good company, and with a touch of Mediterranean magic.
happyHours.p3: We're currently crafting something special for you — new offers and experiences are on their way.

why.feature2Desc: A restaurant with a panoramic view of the sea, where every moment is filled with light and space.
why.feature3Desc: Our team takes care of you with sincerity, paying attention to the little things: from serving to dish recommendations.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: La Medusa Restaurant respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.
s1.p2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our website or interact with our services.
s1.p3: This policy is designed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union.
s1.p4: By using our website, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

s2.title: 2. Data Controller
s2.p1: The data controller responsible for processing personal data is:
s2.name: La Medusa Restaurant & Cocktail Bar
s2.p2: For privacy-related inquiries, you may contact us through the website contact form or official communication channels.

s4.title: 4. How We Use Your Data
s4.p1: We process personal data for the following purposes:
s4.p2: We only process personal data when we have a valid legal basis under GDPR.

s5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
s5.p1: The legal basis for processing personal data includes:
items: Consent (when required for marketing or cookies)

s6.title: 6. Data Sharing
s6.p1: We do not sell personal data.
s6.p2: Your information may be shared only with trusted service providers when necessary, such as:
s6.p3: All third parties are required to comply with GDPR standards.

s7.title: 7. Data Retention
s7.p1: Personal data is stored only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
s7.p2: Reservation-related data may be stored for operational and legal reasons.
s7.p3: After this period, data will be securely deleted or anonymized.

s8.title: 8. Your Rights Under GDPR
s8.p1: Under the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the following rights:
items: The right to access your personal data
The right to correct inaccurate information
The right to request deletion of your data
The right to object to certain processing activities
s8.p2: Requests regarding your personal data can be submitted through our contact channels.

s9.title: 9. Cookies
s9.p1: Our website may use cookies to improve user experience and analyze website traffic.
items: Essential cookies required for website functionality
s9.p3: You can control cookie settings through your browser.

s10.title: 10. Data Security
s10.p1: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against:
s10.p2: However, no online system can guarantee absolute security.

s11.title: 11. Third-Party Links
s11.p1: Our website may contain links to third-party websites.
s11.p2: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those external websites.

s12.title: 12. Changes to this Privacy Policy
s12.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
s12.p2: Any changes will be published on this page.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: Welcome to La Medusa Restaurant. These Terms of Service govern the use of our website and services, including table reservations, dining services, and any communication through our website or online platforms.
s1.p2: By accessing our website or making a reservation, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service.
s1.p3: If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our website or services.

s2.title: 2. Restaurant Information
s2.name: La Medusa Restaurant & Cocktail Bar
s2.p1: The restaurant operates in accordance with the laws of Spain and the regulations of the European Union.

s3.title: 3. Reservations
s3.p2: The restaurant reserves the right to confirm reservations manually.
s3.p3: For large group reservations (usually more than 8 people), a minimum spend or deposit may be required.
s3.p4: Reservations are held for 15 minutes after the scheduled time unless otherwise agreed.

s4.title: 4. Deposits and Minimum Spend
s4.p1: For group bookings or special events, the restaurant may require:
s4.p2: Deposits are required to secure the reservation and prevent last-minute cancellations.
s4.p3: Deposit conditions will always be communicated before confirmation of the booking.
s4.p4: If a customer cancels within the cancellation period agreed during booking, the deposit may be refunded or transferred to another reservation date.

s5.title: 5. Cancellation Policy
s5.p1: Customers are encouraged to cancel reservations as early as possible.
s5.p2: For large bookings requiring a deposit:
items: Cancellations made at least 24 hours in advance may qualify for a refund
Cancellations made later may result in the deposit being retained
s5.p3: The restaurant reserves the right to cancel reservations due to:

s6.title: 6. Prices and Payments
s6.p1: All prices listed by the restaurant are in Euros (€) unless stated otherwise.
s6.p2: Prices may include applicable taxes according to Spanish law.
s6.p4: Prices may change without prior notice.

s7.title: 7. Customer Conduct
s7.p1: Customers are expected to behave respectfully toward staff and other guests.
s7.p2: The restaurant reserves the right to refuse service to customers who:
items: Violate local laws or safety rules

s8.title: 8. Food Allergies and Dietary Requirements
s8.p1: Customers with food allergies or dietary restrictions should inform the staff before ordering.
s8.p2: While the restaurant takes precautions, it cannot guarantee a completely allergen-free environment.

s9.title: 9. Website Use
s9.p1: Users agree not to misuse the website.
items: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to the website
Disrupting the operation of the website
s9.p3: All website content including images, branding, and text belongs to the restaurant unless otherwise stated.

s10.title: 10. Privacy and Data Protection
s10.p1: The restaurant processes personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
s10.p3: This information is used only for reservation management and customer communication.
s10.p4: Personal data is never sold to third parties.
s10.p5: For more information, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

s11.title: 11. Liability
s11.p1: The restaurant is not responsible for:
items: Delays caused by circumstances beyond our control
Service disruptions caused by technical issues
s11.p2: Customers use the restaurant services at their own discretion.

s12.title: 12. Governing Law
s12.p1: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of Spain and the European Union.
s12.p2: Any disputes shall be resolved in accordance with Spanish law.

s13.title: 13. Changes to Terms
s13.p1: The restaurant reserves the right to update these Terms of Service at any time.
s13.p2: Updated versions will be published on the website.

s1.title: 1. What Are Cookies
s1.p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites function properly, improve user experience, and provide analytical information about how visitors interact with the site.
s1.p2: Cookies do not typically contain information that directly identifies a user, but they may be linked to personal data if such information is provided.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
s2.p1: La Medusa Restaurant uses cookies for several purposes, including:
s2.p2: Cookies may also help us understand how visitors interact with our website so we can improve our services.

s3.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
s3.type1Desc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. Without these cookies, certain services on the website may not be available.
s3.type2Desc: Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors use the website.
s3.type2Info: They may collect information such as:
s3.type2Note: This information helps improve the functionality of the website.
s3.type3Desc: These cookies remember user preferences, such as language settings or interface preferences.

s4.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
s4.p1: Some cookies may be placed by third-party services integrated into the website.
s4.p2: These may include services such as:
items: Embedded maps or social media content
s4.p3: Third-party providers have their own privacy and cookie policies.

s5.title: 5. Managing Cookies
s5.p1: When you visit our website for the first time, you may see a cookie banner allowing you to accept or manage cookies.
s5.p3: You can also manage cookies through your browser settings.
items2: Receive notifications when cookies are set
s5.p5: However, disabling some cookies may affect the functionality of the website.

s6.title: 6. Legal Basis
s6.p1: The use of cookies on this website is based on:
items: User consent (for analytics or optional cookies)
s6.p2: This approach complies with EU GDPR and the ePrivacy Directive.

s7.title: 7. Updates to This Cookie Policy
s7.p1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time.
s7.p2: The updated version will always be available on this page.

home.title: La Medusa — Mediterranean Restaurant
home.description: Experience the taste of Mediterranean cuisine against the backdrop of the Atlantic Ocean. Fresh seafood, handmade pasta, and an unforgettable atmosphere at La Medusa.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about La Medusa — our story, our team, and our passion for Mediterranean cuisine by the ocean.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with La Medusa. Find our location, opening hours, and contact details for reservations.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: Explore our Mediterranean menu — tapas, seafood, pasta, pizza, paella, and more at La Medusa.

seafood.title: Seafood
seafood.description: Discover our fresh seafood selection — ocean-to-table dishes crafted with the finest Mediterranean ingredients.

pasta.title: Pasta
pasta.description: Handmade pasta dishes inspired by Italian tradition. Fresh ingredients and authentic Mediterranean flavours at La Medusa.

happyHours.title: Happy Hours
happyHours.description: Enjoy special offers during Happy Hours at La Medusa. Great drinks and bites at unbeatable prices.

birthdays.title: Birthday Celebrations
birthdays.description: Celebrate your birthday at La Medusa. Special packages for unforgettable moments with friends and family.
